mapper.select: SELECT * FROM import_record WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY row_no ASC
SELECT * FROM import_record WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND status = 'INVALID' ORDER BY row_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM import_record WHERE period_id = #{periodId} AND unit_id = #{unitId} AND status = 'VALID'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO import_record (batch_id, row_no, account_code, account_name, amount, dimension1, dimension2, dimension3, status, error_msg) VALUES
(#{r.batchId}, #{r.rowNo}, #{r.accountCode}, #{r.accountName}, #{r.amount}, #{r.dimension1}, #{r.dimension2}, #{r.dimension3}, #{r.status}, #{r.errorMsg})

update.foreach: UPDATE import_record SET status = #{r.status}, error_msg = #{r.errorMsg}, validate_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{r.id}
